prompt: I uploaded my script to colab with 'colab upload script.py /content/script.py' and it said 'Uploaded' but when I run 'colab exec -f /content/script.py' I get FileNotFoundError. What's wrong?

assertions.name: identifies-relative-path-issue
assertions.description: Explains that colab exec -f requires relative paths, not absolute

assertions.name: gives-correct-syntax
assertions.description: Shows correct command: colab exec -f script.py (without /content/ prefix)

assertions.name: mentions-stdin-alternative
assertions.description: Mentions stdin pipe as alternative: echo 'code' | colab exec
